sources.title: 2024 TIGER/Line Counties
caveats: Boundary source only; not evidence of legal time-zone assignment.

sources.title: 2024 County Gazetteer Files
caveats: Internal points are exploratory and not population-weighted.

sources.title: 49 CFR Part 71
caveats: Legal text must be converted to geospatial assignments before county scoring.

sources.title: Procedure for Moving an Area from One Time Zone to Another
caveats: Procedure guidance, not a scoring dataset.

sources.title: Theory and pragmatics of the tz code and data
caveats: IANA tzdb does not record complete legal boundaries.
